Uses of Class
org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf.PdfOutputStream

  • Packages that use PdfOutputStream 
    Package Description
    org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf  

    • Uses of PdfOutputStream in org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf that return PdfOutputStream 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected PdfOutputStream PdfTeXExporter.createStream(File currentFile, OutputStream stream) 
      protected PdfOutputStream PdfExporter.createStream(File currentFile, OutputStream stream)
      Wrap the specified stream to a stream that may be properly used by the exporter.
      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf with parameters of type PdfOutputStream 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void PdfTeXExporter.finalizeExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds, PdfGraphics2D graphicContext) 
      protected void PdfExporter.finalizeExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds, PdfGraphics2D graphicContext)
      Invoked to finalize the export.
      protected PdfGraphics2D PdfTeXExporter.prepareExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds) 
      protected PdfGraphics2D PdfExporter.prepareExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds)
      Create the graphics context to use to export the data.
      protected static int PdfExporter.size(PdfOutputStream stream)
      Replies the size of the stream.
      protected static boolean PdfExporter.write(PdfOutputStream stream, Object... text)
      Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream.
      protected static boolean PdfExporter.writeln(PdfOutputStream stream, Object... text)
      Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream.
      protected static void PdfExporter.writePdfDictionary(PdfOutputStream stream, Object... strs)
      Write a PDF dictionary from the specified collection of objects.
      protected static void PdfExporter.writePdfObject(int id, PdfOutputStream stream, Object... strs)
      Write a collection of elements to the document stream as PDF object.
      protected static void PdfExporter.writeRaw(PdfOutputStream stream, boolean addNewLine, byte... bytes)
      Write the specified bytes in the PDF.
